title: Defying the Nazis: The Sharps' War
original_title: Defying the Nazis: The Sharps' War
overview: Join an American couple’s courageous mission in 1939 to help refugees escape Nazi-occupied Europe. Over the course of two years, the pair will risk their lives so that hundreds can live in freedom.
